questionHtml: The centres of two identical fixed conducting spheres each of charge +Q are separated by a distance D. C is the midpoint of the line joining the centres of the spheres.
markschemeHtml:
Constant, non-zero within spheres ✓

A clear, non-zero positive minimum at C ✓

Symmetric bowl shaped up curved shape in between ✓

 

Do not allow a bowl shaped down curve for MP3.

meta.title: The centres of two identical fixed conducting spheres each of charge +Q are separated by a distance D. C is the midpoint of the line joining the centres of the spheres. Sketch, on
